items.title: coverage.py documentation
items.note: Authoritative reference for the Python coverage tool — config, branch coverage, exclusions.

items.title: pytest-cov
items.note: The pytest plugin that drives coverage.py from your test command.

items.title: diff-cover
items.note: Diff-coverage tool — gate PRs on coverage of changed lines.

items.title: mutmut — mutation testing for Python
items.note: Popular mutation tester; combine with coverage to expose weak asserts.

items.title: Martin Fowler — TestCoverage
items.note: Classic short essay on why coverage targets without good asserts are theatre.
